records.ety: [OE. felicite, F. flicit, fr. L. felicitas, fr. felix, -icis, happy, fruitful; akin to fetus.]

defs: The state of being happy; blessedness; blissfulness; enjoyment of good.
quotes: Our own felicity we make or find.
Finally, after this life, to attain everlasting joy and felicity.

defs: That which promotes happiness; a successful or gratifying event; prosperity; blessing.
quotes: the felicities of her wonderful reign.

defs: A pleasing faculty or accomplishment; as, felicity in painting portraits, or in writing or talking.
